v.description: Watches files and records, or triggers actions, when they change.

checks.name: Maintained

documentation.shortDescription: Determines if the project is "actively maintained".

checks.reason: 30 commit(s) and 0 issue activity found in the last 90 days -- score normalized to 10

checks.name: Code-Review

documentation.shortDescription: Determines if the project requires human code review before pull requests (aka merge requests) are merged.

checks.reason: Found 15/30 approved changesets -- score normalized to 5

checks.name: CII-Best-Practices

documentation.shortDescription: Determines if the project has an OpenSSF (formerly CII) Best Practices Badge.

checks.reason: no effort to earn an OpenSSF best practices badge detected

documentation.shortDescription: Determines if the project's GitHub Action workflows avoid dangerous patterns.

checks.name: License

documentation.shortDescription: Determines if the project has defined a license.

details: Info: project has a license file: LICENSE:0
Info: FSF or OSI recognized license: MIT License: LICENSE:0
